failedAssertions.reason: Negative by-value return reuse fixture compiled successfully and emitted invalid Go instead of failing with a move diagnostic; `go build` on the generated evidence then failed with "too many return values".

appliedUpdates.description: Added a dedicated flow-validator guidance section for rgoc/generated-Go ownership validation, including serial execution, evidence location, representative fixture sources, move-diagnostic checks, cleanup-order checks, and generic-instantiation checks.
